rulings.Case Title: BETTY WILLIAMS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. DOES 1 THROUGH 75, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Defendant Parker Hannifin Corporation To Provide Further Substantive Responses To Plaintiffs Discovery, Including Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, Requests For Production, And Requests For Admission On Shortened Time; And (2) For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, June 25, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion for order (1) compelling defendant Parker Hannifin Corporation to provide further substantive responses to plaintiffs' discovery and (2) for monetary sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m., not 9:00 a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY WILLIAMS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. DOES 1 THROUGH 75, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant Parker Hannifin Corporation As Successor-In-Interest To Eis Brake Parts And Cali Blok To Produce Its Person Most Knowledgeable, Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents On Shortened Time, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, June 25, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion for order compelling defendant Parker Hannifin Corporation to produce its person most knowledgeable, custodian of records and request for production of documents and for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)
